name: Nalco Company
description: Nalco Company, now known as Nalco Water, is a leading global provider of water treatment and process improvement services, programs, and technologies. Founded in 1928 as the National Aluminate Corporation, the company specializes in helping industrial and institutional customers optimize water and energy use while reducing environmental impact. Nalco provides essential solutions for boiler, cooling, and wastewater systems across various industries. In December 2011, Nalco was acquired by Ecolab Inc. for approximately $5.4 billion, becoming a wholly owned subsidiary and a core component of Ecolab's global water, hygiene, and energy technologies and services portfolio.
